pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page for the choral organization, highlighting key programs, concerts, scholarships, and calls to action, and routing users into key task flows.
primary_functions: Provide clear entry points to donate, join auditions, view concerts, apply for scholarships, volunteer, and explore programs
Highlight upcoming concerts, workshops, and news with links to detailed pages
Surface quick links to set up donations, purchase tickets, and register for programs

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click homepage CTA or quick link to support the Youth Scholarship Fund monthly
Click 'Youth Choir Auditions' teaser for next-month Main Campus slots
Click 'Apply for Tuition Scholarships' homepage CTA
Click 'Volunteer as an Usher' homepage CTA
Click 'Find a Choir for Your Teen' CTA
Click 'Stay Informed' or footer newsletter signup prompt
Click homepage promo for adult community workshops

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Home' link in the main header navigation and logo click
Accessible by visiting '/' or 'index.html' directly

pages.name: Donate
pages.description: Main donation page for one-time and recurring gifts, including designated funds such as the Youth Scholarship Fund. Loads fund and amount options and creates an on-site donation draft prior to review.
primary_functions: Allow donors to select a fund (including 'Youth Scholarship Fund') and choose donation type (one-time or monthly recurring)
Provide suggested donation amounts and allow selection of the appropriate amount (e.g., the smallest amount at least $25)
Let donors choose a start date for recurring donations (e.g., first day of next month)
Offer an option to cover processing fees via a checkbox
Collect required donor information (name, email and other basic fields) and proceed to an on-site donation review page

incoming_params.description: Optional DonationFund.slug used to preselect a specific fund such as 'youth_scholarship_fund'.
Optional donation frequency key (e.g., 'monthly') to preselect the appropriate frequency option.
Optional donation amount in the configured currency to preselect among suggested amounts.
Optional context string such as 'set_up_monthly_donation' used for analytics or to adjust helper text.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Review Donation' after successfully calling createOrUpdateDonationDraft to move the draft into 'in_review' status

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Donate' link in the main header navigation
Accessible from the 'Donate' link in the global footer
Can be visited directly at 'donate.html', optionally with query parameters to preselect fund and frequency

pages.name: Donation Review
pages.description: On-site confirmation page summarizing donation details before any external payment processing. Reads the current donation draft from local state and allows final review or editing.
primary_functions: Display a clear summary of the donors selected fund, frequency, amount, start date, and fee coverage choice
Allow donors to confirm details or go back to edit the donation setup on the main donation page
Provide an on-site step where donors can review their information before proceeding to payment (if implemented)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Edit Donation' to return to the donation form while keeping the existing draft in local state

access_methods.description: Reached after submitting the donation form on donate.html and creating/updating a donation draft

pages.name: Auditions & Registration
pages.description: Listing and registration hub for youth choir auditions across locations and dates. Supports filtering by age, location, month, and time of day and submitting registrations for specific slots.
primary_functions: List youth choir audition opportunities with filters for age/grade (e.g., options suitable for a 10-year-old), location (e.g., Main Campus), month, and time of day
Allow users to navigate to the next calendar month and view available weekday evening audition slots
Let users select a specific audition time slot and open a registration form for that slot
Collect child and guardian details (name, age, contact phone, email) and submit an on-site audition registration for the chosen time

incoming_params.description: Optional child age used to preselect the appropriate age/grade filter (e.g., 10).
Optional Location.id to preselect an audition location such as 'main_campus'.
Optional calendar year used to initialize the audition month picker.
Optional calendar month (112) used to initialize the audition month picker.
Optional time-of-day filter key such as 'evening'.
Optional flag indicating that only weekday (MondayFriday) slots should be shown initially.
Optional AuditionSlot.id to auto-expand details or scroll to a specific slot.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Join / Auditions' link in the main header navigation
Accessible from the 'Auditions' link in the footer
Filters and highlighted slots can be pre-configured via query parameters such as age, location_id, and month
Can be visited directly at 'auditions.html'

pages.name: Scholarships & Tuition Aid
pages.description: Overview and application page for need-based tuition scholarships and other financial aid. Loads scholarship options and seasons and submits applications online.
primary_functions: Explain available scholarship types, including need-based tuition scholarships and eligibility criteria
Provide an 'Apply Now' flow that scrolls to or loads the tuition scholarship application form for a selected season (e.g., 20252026)
Allow applicants to select scholarship type (e.g., 'Need-based tuition scholarship'), season/year, and current singer status
Collect required financial information, including household income range (with options below specified thresholds such as $60,000)
Collect required singer and guardian details and short-answer explanations of financial need, and submit the complete scholarship application on-site

incoming_params.description: Optional Season.id to preselect the scholarship season, e.g., the 20252026 season.
Optional ScholarshipType.id to preselect a specific scholarship type such as need-based tuition.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Scholarships & Aid' link in the main header navigation
Accessible via the 'Scholarships & Financial Aid' link in the footer
Season and scholarship type can be preselected with query parameters such as season_id and scholarship_type_id
Can be visited directly at 'scholarships.html'

pages.name: Events & Concerts
pages.description: Events hub for concerts and performances, including detailed information for each event and entry into the ticket purchasing flow.
primary_functions: List upcoming concerts and events with filters for month/year (e.g., show December events of the current year)
Let users open an individual event detail view (e.g., 'Holiday Concert') showing description, date, time, venue, and pricing tiers overview
Provide a prominent 'Buy Tickets' or 'Select Seats' button on the event detail view that leads to ticket selection
Support linking directly to a specific event detail state via URL parameters (e.g., events.html?event_id=holiday_concert)

incoming_params.description: Optional year used to initialize the event listing filter (e.g., current year).
Optional month (112) used to initialize the event listing filter (e.g., 12 for December).
Optional event type filter key such as 'concert'.
Optional Event.id used to open an event detail panel directly, e.g., 'holiday_concert'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Buy Tickets' or 'Select Seats' on an event detail view

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Concerts & Tickets' link in the main header navigation
Accessible from the 'Concerts & Tickets' link in the footer
Event listings and details can be deep-linked via year, month, event_type, and event_id parameters
Can be visited directly at 'events.html'

pages.name: Ticket Selection
pages.description: Seat and price-tier selection page for purchasing tickets to a specific concert or event. Uses event context from the URL and manages seat selection before checkout.
primary_functions: Show available price tiers for the selected event and clearly identify mid-priced options under a specified amount (e.g., under $50)
Allow users to select a specific price tier (e.g., a mid-priced $35 tier) for their tickets
Display a seating chart, when applicable, and enable selection of two adjacent seats within the chosen price tier
Allow users to set or confirm ticket quantity (e.g., 2 tickets) matching their seat selection
Provide an 'Add to Cart' or 'Continue' action that moves the user to the on-site checkout page

incoming_params.description: Required Event.id indicating which event's tickets are being selected.
Optional TicketPriceTier.id to preselect a specific price tier when entering the page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add to Cart' or 'Continue' after successfully selecting seats and calling selectSeatsAndAddToCart

access_methods.description: Reached from an event detail view with the event_id parameter in the URL
Can be loaded directly at 'tickets.html?event_id=...'; event_id is required for correct behavior

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: On-site checkout page to review selected tickets and enter buyer information before final order review. Relies on the current ticket cart stored in local state.
primary_functions: Display a summary of selected tickets (event name, date, price tier, seats, quantity, and total cost)
Collect required buyer information such as name and email using simple form fields
Allow users to confirm ticket quantities and pricing before proceeding
Provide a 'Review Order' or equivalent button that advances to the final order summary page on-site

incoming_params.description: Optional context indicating that checkout was entered from ticket selection.
Optional TicketOrder.id used when returning from the order review page to edit buyer information.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Review Order' after successfully calling updateTicketBuyerInfoAndCreateOrder

access_methods.description: Entered after selecting seats and clicking 'Continue' from the Ticket Selection page
May be revisited directly with an order_id query parameter to edit an existing in-review order

pages.name: Order Review
pages.description: Final on-site order summary for tickets before any payment confirmation. Shows immutable order details and offers a path back to checkout for edits.
primary_functions: Present a complete, read-only summary of the ticket order, including event details, seat locations, quantities, and total charges
Allow the user to go back to checkout to edit buyer information or quantities if needed
Serve as the last on-site review step before order placement or external payment processing (if implemented)

incoming_params.description: Required TicketOrder.id identifying which order to display for review.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Edit Details' to return to checkout while preserving the in-review order

access_methods.description: Reached after submitting buyer information and creating an order in 'in_review' status
Can be visited directly using 'order_review.html?order_id=...' to view an existing ticket order in review

pages.name: Volunteer Opportunities
pages.description: Central page for discovering and signing up for volunteer roles such as ushers and event support. Provides filters and on-page registration forms for specific shifts.
primary_functions: List volunteer opportunities with filters for role category (e.g., 'Event Support'), date range/month, and day of week (e.g., Saturdays)
Allow users to identify roles mentioning 'Usher' or 'Front-of-House' and view their detailed descriptions and time ranges
Provide a detailed view for each opportunity where users can see shift duration (e.g., at least 3 hours) and responsibilities
Include an on-page sign-up form for a specific opportunity that collects volunteer name, email, phone number, and optional subscription to volunteer updates/newsletters
Enable submission of a volunteer registration for the selected shift entirely on-site

incoming_params.description: Optional role category filter key such as 'event_support'.
Optional year used to initialize the volunteer opportunity month filter.
Optional month (112) used to initialize the volunteer opportunity month filter.
Optional day-of-week filter key such as 'saturday'.
Optional Location.id to preselect volunteer opportunities at a particular venue.
Optional VolunteerOpportunity.id used to open a specific opportunity detail view.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Volunteer' link in the main header navigation
Accessible from the 'Volunteer Opportunities' link in the footer
Filters and selected opportunity can be configured via query parameters like role_category and opportunity_id
Can be visited directly at 'volunteer.html'

pages.name: Youth Choirs & Ensembles
pages.description: Overview and detail hub for youth ensembles, including rehearsal schedules, tuition, and registration start. Supports filtering by age and comparing ensemble details.
primary_functions: List youth ensembles with filters for age or grade levels (e.g., show ensembles that include age 13 or 'Middle School')
Allow users to open individual ensemble detail views that show eligibility, rehearsal day/time (including end time), and tuition/fees
Help users compare at least two ensembles by allowing easy navigation between ensemble details to check rehearsal end times (e.g., by 7:30 PM) and tuition limits (e.g., under $600)
Provide a 'Register' or 'Enroll' button on eligible ensemble detail views that opens an on-site registration form state
Collect basic singer information (name, age, school) and selected season (e.g., 20252026) and allow users to continue to the next registration step without leaving the site

incoming_params.description: Optional singer age used to pre-filter ensembles that accept that age (e.g., 13).
Optional Season.id to limit ensembles to a specific season.
Optional maximum tuition threshold (e.g., 600) used to filter ensembles by cost.
Optional latest acceptable rehearsal end time in HH:MM 24-hour format (e.g., '19:30').
Optional Ensemble.id to open a specific ensemble detail view on load.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Schedule an Audition' from an ensemble detail to view compatible audition slots
Click 'Need Tuition Assistance?' from an ensemble detail to open the scholarship page for the same season

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Choirs & Ensembles' link in the main header navigation
Accessible from the 'Choirs & Ensembles' link in the footer
Filters and selected ensemble can be controlled via query parameters such as age, season_id, and ensemble_id
Can be visited directly at 'ensembles.html'

pages.name: Newsletter Signup
pages.description: Dedicated email subscription page for choosing topics of interest and email frequency. Loads available interest and frequency options and submits subscriptions.
primary_functions: Collect an email address for newsletter subscription (e.g., sample.user@example.com)
Allow users to select specific interests such as 'Upcoming Concerts' and 'Scholarships & Financial Aid' and deselect other topics
Provide a frequency setting (e.g., 'Monthly' or 'Monthly Digest') and prevent selection of daily or weekly options when monthly is chosen
Collect required name fields (first and last name) while leaving organization fields optional
Allow users to agree to terms or privacy policy via a checkbox and submit their subscription preferences through an on-site form

incoming_params.description: Optional context label such as 'homepage_footer' indicating where the signup was initiated.
Optional comma-separated list of interest keys (e.g., 'upcoming_concerts,scholarships_financial_aid') to preselect on load.
Optional newsletter frequency key (e.g., 'monthly') to preselect.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click privacy policy link from the newsletter consent text

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Newsletter' link in the main header navigation
Accessible from the 'Newsletter Signup' link in the footer
Can be visited directly at 'newsletter.html', optionally with preselect_interests and frequency query parameters

pages.name: Community Workshops
pages.description: Listing and registration hub for community singing workshops and educational programs. Supports filtering by age group, price, date, and location, and on-page reservation.
primary_functions: List workshops with filters for age group (e.g., Adult/18+), fee/price (e.g., Free/$0), month (including next month), and location (e.g., Downtown)
Allow users to narrow down to adult, free, downtown workshops occurring in the next calendar month
Provide a workshop detail view showing description, date, time, venue, and capacity when a specific workshop is selected
Include a 'Register' or 'Reserve Spot' action that opens an on-page registration form for the selected workshop
Collect participant quantity (e.g., 1) and required contact information (name, email) and submit the reservation entirely on-site

incoming_params.description: Optional age group key such as 'adult_18_plus' used to filter workshops.
Optional fee type key such as 'free' used to filter workshops.
Optional year used to initialize the workshop month filter.
Optional month (112) used to initialize the workshop month filter.
Optional Location.id, such as 'downtown', used to pre-filter workshops by location.
Optional Workshop.id used to open a specific workshop detail view.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Community Programs' link in the main header navigation
Accessible from the 'Community Workshops' link in the footer
Filters and selected workshop can be configured via query parameters such as age_group, fee_type, and workshop_id
Can be visited directly at 'workshops.html'

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the nonprofit choral organization, its mission, and its impact, powered by structured organization profile data.
primary_functions: Describe the organizations mission, history, and focus on youth scholarships and community singing
Introduce artistic and administrative leadership, staff, and board members
Explain key programs such as youth choirs, scholarships, concerts, and community workshops to build trust with donors and participants

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact Us' call-to-action from the About page content

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'About' link in the site footer
Can be visited directly at 'about.html'

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and form for general inquiries about programs, auditions, scholarships, and events, using structured contact info and form submission.
primary_functions: Display key contact information such as phone numbers, email addresses, and mailing address for the organization
Provide a simple contact form for general questions related to auditions, scholarships, volunteering, and concerts
Optionally show location maps or directions to main venues or campuses

incoming_params.description: Optional topic hint such as 'auditions', 'scholarships', 'volunteering', or 'concerts' to preselect in the contact form.
Optional short subject line to prefill in the contact form.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Contact' link in the footer
Can be visited directly at 'contact.html', optionally with topic and subject query parameters

pages.name: Policies
pages.description: Consolidated policies page including privacy policy, terms of use, and relevant organizational data-handling policies.
primary_functions: Present the organizations privacy policy, including details relevant to newsletter subscriptions, donations, and registrations
Outline terms of use for the website, including ticketing and event participation policies
Provide information on data handling for donations, scholarships, and youth registrations to reassure users about information security

incoming_params.description: Optional section anchor such as 'privacy' or 'terms' used to scroll to a specific part of the policies content.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Privacy & Terms' link in the footer
Can be visited directly at 'policies.html', optionally with a section query parameter

header_links.description: Homepage with quick access to all major sections
Youth choirs and ensemble overview and registration start
Youth choir audition listings and registration
Concert and event listings with access to ticket purchasing
Community singing workshops and educational programs
Tuition scholarships and financial aid information and application
Volunteer opportunities such as ushers and event support
Make a one-time or recurring donation to organizational funds
Subscribe to email updates with selected interests and frequency

footer_links.description: Learn about the organizations mission and leadership
Contact information and general inquiry form
Privacy policy and website terms of use
Youth ensemble offerings and registration start
Information and sign-up for youth choir auditions
Overview and application for tuition scholarships
Sign up for volunteer roles and shifts
Support the organization and the Youth Scholarship Fund
